questionHtml: Find the slant height of the cone-shaped container.
markschemeHtml:
(slant height2) = (5.2)2 + 132   (M1)

Note: Award (M1) for correct substitution into the formula.

14.0  (14.0014…) (cm)     (A1)(G2)

[2 marks]
